title: Tinkers' Addons(Fork) with Mod Support
description: It adds 2 new modifiers(inspired by old Tinkers' Construct 1.0 modifiers) to Tinkers' Construct 2.0, Construct's Armory and Tinker's SlashBlade.
body:
[This is a fork of Tinkers' Addons by oitsjustjose.](https://modrinth.com/mod/tinkers-addons)

It adds 2 new modifiers(inspired by old Tinkers' Construct 1.0 modifiers) to Tinkers' Construct 2.0, [Construct's Armory](https://modrinth.com/mod/constructs-armory) and [Tinker's SlashBlade](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/tinkers-slashblade):

1. Auto-Repair (Levelable like the old version; caps at Auto-Repair V)
2. Bonus Modifiers (Level I, II, III and IV), they work the same as the old bonus modifiers
